tables.description: This subject phenotypes data table contains self-reported ethnicity, whether subject has greater than 90% European ancestry, family history of testicular germ cell cancer (TGCT), status for bilateral TGCT, laterality of TGCT, status for cryptorchidism, age at first TGCT diagnosis, and TGCT histology.

variables.name: >90% EUR Genetic Ancestry
variables.description: Indicates whether or not the subject has greater than 90% European ancestry

variables.name: Age at 1st TGCT
variables.description: Age at which subject had first testicular germ cell tumor diagnosis

variables.name: Bilateral
variables.description: Subject had bilateral testicular germ cell tumor

variables.name: Cryptorchidism
variables.description: Subject had undescended testicles

variables.name: Ethnicity
variables.description: Self-reported ethnicity

variables.name: Family history of TGCT
variables.description: Family history of testicular germ cell tumor

variables.name: Histology TGCT
variables.description: Indicates the histological components of the subject's testicular germ cell tumor

variables.name: Laterality
variables.description: Indicates the laterality of the subject's testicular germ cell tumor

variables.name: Subject_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: This sample attributes table includes body site, analyte type, tumor status, histological type, and collection age.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte type of the cancer tumor

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site of the cancer tumor

variables.name: COLLECTION AGE
variables.description: Age of subject when sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

tables.description: The subject consent dataset contains subject IDs, consent group information, biological sex, and subject aliases.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Biological sex

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID used in the source repository

variables.name: SUBJECT_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository from where subjects originate

variables.name: Subject_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: This subject sample mapping data table includes a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: Subject_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
